mapper.select: SELECT sr.id, sr.tenant_id, sr.leaderboard_id, sr.instance_id, sr.metric_id, sr.user_id, sr.score, sr.payload, m.name AS metric_name, m.metric_id AS metric_external_id FROM score_record sr JOIN metric m ON sr.metric_id = m.id WHERE sr.leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} AND sr.instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY sr.user_id
